name: eval-loops
description: Skills and subagents for the full LLM eval lifecycle (context, tracing, simulation, datasets, annotation, error analysis + triage, judge building, judge calibration, fix-and-ablate). A superset of Hamel Husain's evals-skills that adds stage-aware orchestrators (vibe / rigor), self-improving supervisor loops, an LLM-council annotator, and profile lenses for guardrails and RAG features. Tool-specific flavors (Braintrust, LangSmith, etc.) ship as separate plugins that override individual skills.
